message:
refactor(robot): extract Get* functions for CLI/REST parity

Refactor Print* functions to extract Get* counterparts that return
data structs directly instead of JSON-encoding output:

- PrintSnapshotDelta -> GetSnapshotDelta + PrintSnapshotDelta wrapper
- PrintTriage -> GetTriage + PrintTriage wrapper

This enables the REST API to share the same logic without going through
JSON encoding/decoding, improving consistency between CLI and API.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
